title: Jamaican Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and vibrant stir fry dish inspired by the spices of Jamaica, served with a side of rice.

ingredients.name: Optional: your favorite stir-fry protein (chicken, tofu, etc.)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and bell peppers and stir-fry until they begin to soften.
Add the Jamaican spice blend and stir-fry for another minute.
If using protein, add it to the skillet and stir-fry until cooked through.
Add the vermicelli noodles to the skillet and stir-fry until they are well coated with the spice blend and slightly toasted.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional Jamaican spice blend if desired.
